_publications._publicationTitle: Proof of Concept for Genome Profiling of the Neurofibroma/Sarcoma Sequence in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: The FASTQ files were loaded into the Varsome Clinical software v.12.3.2 to perform Tumor–Normal matching
details: Successfully sequenced exome-captured DNA samples, generating FASTQ files for downstream analysis of MPNST genomic variants
